--- 
title: "Intervention Mapping Workbook"
author: "Nicole, GJ & Rob"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
output: bookdown::gitbook
documentclass: book
bibliography: [bibliography.bib, packages.bib]
biblio-style: apalike
link-citations: yes
description: "The description of this book"
---

# Introduction {-}

This book lives at https://intervention-mapping.gitlab.io/uva-im
